Headline: #7 Harrison Temporary Eastbound Reroute near Harrison/Kedzie
ShortDescription: Eastbound 7 Harrison buses are temporarily rerouted, due to street blockage near Harrison/Kedzie.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Eastbound #7 Harrison buses are temporarily rerouted via Harrison, Kedzie, Jackson, Sacramento, Harrison, and resume normal route, due to street blockage near Harrison/Kedzie.

Westbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: #26 South Shore Express buses Temporary Reroute at 106th/ Buffalo
ShortDescription: #26 South Shore Express buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions, due to a street blockage near 106th/ Buffalo.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#26 South Shore Express buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via 103rd, Torrence,104th, Commercial, 100th, Ewing and over regular route, due to a street blockage near 106th/ Buffalo.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: Trains rerouted downtown: Stations along Lake and Wabash closed
ShortDescription: Orange, Green, Pink and Brown Line trains will be rerouted downtown for work on building a new State/Lake station.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Orange, Green, Pink and Brown line trains will be rerouted downtown for work on building a new State/Lake station.

Orange and Brown Lines: Trains will operate as one route between Kimball and Midway, via the Wells and Van Buren sides of the Loop, downtown.

Green Line: Trains will operate between Harlem/Lake and 63rd street terminals, but via Wells and Van Buren.

Pink Line: Trains will operate between 54th/Cermak and Clinton, only. For continuing service, transfer at Clinton to a Green Line train toward 63rd.

Loop 'L' and subways: To transfer between the Loop elevated and the subways, transfer at H.W. Library (Loop elevated lines) and Jackson (Blue or Red lines via subway).

Tip: Exit at Washington/Wells and board any bus at the Washington/LaSalle Loop Link station for service to Michigan Avenue, Millennium and Grant parks.

Headline: Green Line Service Delayed near Garfield
ShortDescription: Green Line trains are standing near Garfield due to signal problems. Crews working to restore service.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Green Line trains are standing in both directions near Garfield due to signal problems.

At this time, also consider other alternatives that may serve your trip, such as nearby bus routes, or using buses to other rail lines.

These may include:
#4 Cottage Grove
#63 63rd
#29 State

Bus shuttles have been requested from 35th to 63rd/Cottage Grove and 63rd/Ashland, in both directions to provide service through the affected area. 

Personnel are working to restore service. Allow extra travel time.
